# Documentation Index

**Last generated:** 2026-06-07
**Generated by:** create-documentation skill

This is the documentation manifest for Agent Bridge MCP. Start at Tier 1 if you are new to the project.

## Tier 1 — Survival (Start Here)

Get the project running and make your first contribution. Prefer the terse `docs/agents/` cards for speed; fall back to full pages when you need detail.

| Document | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| [Agents: Getting Started](agents/getting-started.md) *(terse)* | Clone, build, run, first PR in 5 minutes |
| [Getting Started](GETTING-STARTED.md) *(full)* | Prerequisites, install, run, first PR |
| [Full Setup Guide](SETUP.md) | Every step from fresh machine to running app |
| [Deployment Guide](DEPLOYMENT.md) | How to deploy to each environment |
| [System Context](ARCHITECTURE/system-context.md) | C4 Level 1 — the system and its environment |
| [Container Architecture](ARCHITECTURE/containers.md) | C4 Level 2 — internal building blocks |
| [Credentials Inventory](CREDENTIALS.md) | Where secrets are stored (not what they are) |

## Tier 2 — Comprehension

Understand why the system was built this way. Prefer the terse `docs/agents/` cards for orientation; fall back to full pages for evidence and diagrams.

| Document | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| [Agents: Architecture](agents/architecture.md) *(terse)* | Module map, boundaries, eight-tool surface |
| [Agents: Data Model](agents/data-model.md) *(terse)* | Registry, task states, filesystem layout |
| [Agents: Security](agents/security.md) *(terse)* | Threat model, workspace confinement, secrets |
| [Architecture Decisions](ADR/INDEX.md) | ADRs explaining significant "why" decisions |
| [External Integrations](INTEGRATIONS.md) | All third-party services and how they connect |
| [Data Model](DATA-MODEL.md) | Core entities, relationships, and data flows |
| [Business Context](BUSINESS-CONTEXT.md) | Domain glossary, personas, business rules |

## Tier 3 — Mastery

Deep-dive reference for daily development work.

| Document | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| [Project Overview](DOCUMENTATION.md) | Comprehensive feature documentation |
| [Security Patterns](SECURITY.md) | Roles, permissions, isolation, and threat notes |

| [Development Workflows](WORKFLOWS/INDEX.md) | How to build tools, endpoints, and tests |

### Standards (Tribal Knowledge)

Conventions are enforced mechanically, not just socially:

| Rule | Enforcement |
|------|-------------|
| Zero warnings | `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` |
| No unused deps | `cargo machete` |
| Duplication < 5% | `npx jscpd` |
| `deny_unknown_fields` on all public inputs | `serde` attribute + test coverage |
| camelCase JSON, snake_case Rust | `serde(rename_all)` macros |
| Single-threaded PTY/process tests | `--test-threads=1` + isolated `ActivePids` |
